hero.subtitle: We design, develop and optimize fast, accessible and responsive digital experiences — engineered to turn visitors into real customers.

services.title:
Everything your site needs,
under one technical standard.

items.title: Custom web development
items.desc: Sites and apps built from scratch with clean code and scalable architecture. No templates, no shortcuts.

items.title: Website redesign
items.desc: We modernize existing sites without losing rankings or content.

items.title: Performance
items.desc: Sub-second loads, green Core Web Vitals, optimized assets.

items.title: Technical SEO
items.desc: Structure, schema, sitemaps, metadata and speed — the base Google needs.

items.title: Accessibility
items.desc: Contrast, focus, screen readers and keyboard nav. WCAG AA.

items.title: Automations
items.desc: We connect your site to your tools: CRM, email, payments, calendars.

items.title: Digital solutions
items.desc: For SMBs that need to streamline processes without adding friction.

problems.title: If this sounds familiar, let's talk.

items.desc: Visitors leave before seeing what you offer.
Technical SEO is missing or broken.
Your brand grew. Your site didn't.
Traffic comes in, but doesn't convert.
Your team spends hours on repetitive tasks.

ba.title:
Same business,
a different result.
ba.desc: Drag the slider to see the impact on performance, SEO and conversion.

steps.desc: Technical audit, business goals and competitive analysis.
Information architecture, roadmap and success metrics.
Wireframes, visual system and interactive prototype.
Clean code, CI/CD, testing and continuous review.
Deploy, monitoring, iterative tuning and support.

quality.title:
We don't ship until
all four metrics are green.
quality.desc: Every project is measured. Every metric documented. Every release audited.

cta.title:
We'll tell you exactly
what to improve.
cta.desc: A technical analysis of performance, SEO and accessibility. No commitment, no hard sell — just a clear report with real priorities.

contact.title: Let's start talking.
contact.name: Name
contact.sent: Thank you — we reply within 24 hours.
contact.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

chat.title: Markish Assistant
chat.greet: Hi, I'm the Markish assistant. What do you need to improve?

options.label: I want a new website
options.reply: Perfect. We build sites from scratch with custom design and code. I'll send a brief and we book a call.

options.label: I want to improve my current site
options.reply: Great. We do a technical audit + prioritized improvement plan. We don't touch your site until everything's clear.

options.label: Optimize SEO, performance or accessibility
options.reply: Three areas where we measure before and after. You get a report with metrics and concrete proposals.

options.label: Automate processes
options.reply: We connect forms, CRM, payments, emails and calendars. You stop doing repetitive work and your team focuses on selling.

options.label: I want a free audit
options.reply: Awesome. I need your URL and an email — within 48h you get the technical report, free of charge.

options.label: Talk on WhatsApp
options.reply: This is a chat demo — in production this would take you straight to WhatsApp. To get in touch for real, use the form.
